ideals: I addressed challenges with precision, coldness, or intimidation
I expressed my heritage, background, or beliefs through my actions
I let people see a glimpse of who I am beneath my mask
system.secondWind: Regain all effort when you fix someone else's mistakes, or someone else fixes yours.

specialAbility.name: Special Ability
specialAbility.effect: You are hardened. Your 4 clock burden gives you no penalties.

powers.name: Clarity
powers.description: If you break, regain all effort, and you can push your next action for free.

powers.name: Scarcoat
powers.description: +1 max strain per Burden you have.

powers.name: Blood Scent
powers.description: You get a knack for tracking or intimidating anyone or anything that's wounded.

powers.name: Go for a Walk
powers.description: 1/session - When you separate from the group to do something alone, get +1d and increased effect on your action. 'Cut to black' and roll the action 'off-screen'.

powers.name: Cornered
powers.description: When you are outnumbered in a tense or violent situation, leading team actions does not cost effort for you.

powers.name: Lurk
powers.description: 1/session - When the GM describes a scene, you can choose to be there, hidden, appropriate to chapter.

powers.name: It's Nothing
powers.description: During Heal Burdens, heal 2 extra ticks on a burden of your choice if nobody helps you. Heal 1 tick on two burdens if someone does help you.

powers.name: Crack Shell
powers.description: When you're exhausted, you can take aid actions without spending effort.

powers.name: Bishop
powers.description: When you set someone up, that person gets both +1d and increased effect on the set up roll.

powers.name: Wick
powers.description: 1/session - Increase the power of your next Excel action to superpowered.

powers.name: Gambit of Arenheir
powers.description: Take a power from another Bond.

gearKits.name: Adventurer's Kit
items: Lantern, pack, bedroll, rope, flint and tinder, journal, rations, cooking pot, knife, canvas tent

gearKits.name: Solo's Kit
items: Shadow cloak, collapsible weapon, spiked gloves and boots, single use flash bomb, toxin vial (sleep, slow poison, or paralysis)

gearKits.name: Survivor's Kit
items: Pick-me-up, old bandages, lock picks, change of clothes, concealed weapon(s), faded memento, knowledge of local streets and back doors

gearKits.name: Wanderer's Kit
items: Weatherproof cloak, hardy traveling outfit, extra rope, survival rations, hunting weapon, knowledge of local fauna and flora
